title: CT Radiation Safety
description: Covers radiation protection principles specific to CT imaging, including dose optimization strategies, shielding requirements, and patient safety protocols.

title: MRI Safety Principles
description: Comprehensive review of MRI safety zones, ferromagnetic screening procedures, and management of patients with implanted devices.

title: Fluoroscopy Fundamentals
description: Practical training on real-time imaging techniques, contrast agent administration, and dose management during fluoroscopic procedures.

title: Pediatric Imaging Techniques
description: Best practices for imaging pediatric patients, including age-appropriate positioning, immobilization, and ALARA dose reduction strategies.

title: Emergency Radiological Response
description: Prepares technologists to respond to radiological emergencies, including decontamination procedures, triage, and coordination with emergency management personnel.

title: Radiation Emergency Planning
description: Introduction to state and local radiation emergency plans, evacuation zones, protective action decision-making, and interagency communication.

title: Nuclear Power Plant Emergency Operations
description: Familiarization with nuclear facility emergency classifications, public protective actions, and the role of medical personnel in the emergency planning zone.

title: Advanced Cardiovascular Life Support (ACLS)
description: Advanced resuscitation training including cardiac arrest algorithms, team dynamics, airway management, and post-cardiac arrest care.

title: Pediatric Advanced Life Support (PALS)
description: Systematic approach to pediatric assessment and resuscitation, covering respiratory emergencies, shock, cardiac arrest, and post-resuscitation stabilization.
